notes: Fix: Preview now ignores enabled flag on scenarios. Root cause: activeScenariosForRender() filtered preview list by `enabled !== false`, AND runProjection() also internally filtered scenarios by enabled. So if you previewed a disabled scenario, neither layer would apply it. Now: preview list is authoritative — any scenario in the preview list gets applied regardless of enabled state. The enabled toggle now ONLY controls whether the scenario appears in the scenarios-page comparison chart (each enabled scenario gets its own line + a 'stacked' line if 2+). Also removed the auto-removal from preview list when toggling enabled off — preview persists independent of enabled.
